export_result.sh SQL query checking for pathology codes starting with T52 or D61.
export_result.sh SQL query filtering prescription order lines.
verifier.py awards full points if lab_count >= 3.
verifier.py checks if appt_days is between 7 and 14.
verifier.py checks if appt_days is between 7 and 14.
Task description explicitly states the user acts as an occupational health physician.
Task description sets the scenario in a petrochemical refinery.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the synthetic GNU Health demo database. The target patient is John Zenon. To pass the diagnosis criterion, an active disease record with an ICD-10 code starting with 'T52' or 'D61' must be created. The verifier requires a minimum of 3 new lab orders for full points. The supportive prescription must contain one of the following substrings in its name: folic, vitamin, ferrous, iron, b12, or cyanocobalamin. The follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 7 and 14 days from the task start date. The user acts as an Occupational Health Physician in the Petrochemical Manufacturing industry.
